articles.title: Dogecoin spikes 9% after logo appears to find way back to Musk’s Twitter
articles.description: Dogecoin mania made a comeback on Tuesday after the logo for the popular meme-based cryptocurrency seemed to find its way back on to the profile of Elon Musk's rebranded Twitter account.
